name: Property Flip ROI
short_description: Calculates the Return on Investment for a property flip, considering purchase cost, renovation cost, and final sale price.

inputs.name: purchase_cost
inputs.description: The initial cost to purchase the property.

inputs.name: renovation_cost
inputs.description: The cost incurred for renovating the property.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: The final price at which the property was sold.

name: After-Tax ROI
short_description: Calculates the after-tax Return on Investment for a project, considering an initial investment, gross profit, and a tax rate.

inputs.name: investment
inputs.description: Initial investment amount

inputs.name: gross_profit
inputs.description: Gross profit earned before taxes

inputs.name: tax_rate
inputs.description: Tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 25 for 25%)

name: Compound-Growth Investment ROI
short_description: Calculates the Return on Investment (ROI) for an investment earning compound interest over a specified number of years.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: Initial investment amount

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: Annual compound interest rate (as a percentage, e.g., 5 for 5%)

inputs.name: years
inputs.description: Number of years the investment is held

name: ROI: Online Marketing Campaign
short_description: Calculates the Return on Investment (ROI) for an online marketing campaign based on impressions, click-through rate, conversion rate, average sale value, and ad spend.

inputs.name: impressions
inputs.description: Total number of times an ad was displayed.

inputs.name: ctr
inputs.description: Click-through rate (as a decimal, e.g., 0.01 for 1%).

inputs.name: conv_rate
inputs.description: Conversion rate (as a decimal, e.g., 0.02 for 2%).

inputs.name: avg_sale
inputs.description: Average revenue generated per sale.

inputs.name: ad_spend
inputs.description: Total cost of the advertising campaign.

name: Mutual Fund ROI: Dividends, Fees, and Price Gain
short_description: Calculates the Return on Investment (ROI) for a mutual fund, considering the initial investment, total dividends received, total management fees paid, and capital gain or loss from selling shares.

inputs.name: shares
inputs.description: Number of shares purchased.

inputs.name: buy_price
inputs.description: Purchase price per share.

inputs.name: sell_price
inputs.description: Selling price per share.

inputs.name: dividend_ps
inputs.description: Annual dividend per share.

inputs.name: years
inputs.description: Total holding period in years.

inputs.name: fee_rate
inputs.description: Annual management fee rate (as a percentage, e.g., 0.8 for 0.8%).
